extra.reason: Remote + CI delivered: private repo rhydlewis/z-for-finder, main pushed, GitHub Actions runs swift build + test on push/PR (verified green, run 27031980885). Test step auto-activates when 7uk lands — that ordering is the only thing that needed 7uk, not the setup itself.

Extracted pure ZFFEngine target (Place/Matcher/Ranker/Rollup/Scoring, Foundation-only); AppState now a thin shell importing it. Added Swift Testing target with 11 tests covering all regressions (separator-insensitive, name-only, deterministic order, v2 suffix, git-root rollup via temp-dir fixture, transient 0.08x down-weight). Verified red/green wiring with a deliberately-broken probe then removed it. swift test green; app builds + runs unaffected.

DECIDED: user-facing name = 'Haunt' ('your haunts' = the places you frequent). Category is clear (no rival Mac launcher/navigator named Haunt). Caveats: common word with scattered prior use (notably a Guile static-site generator); haunt.app domain is parked/for-sale. Follow-ups before branding spend: (1) consider plural 'Haunts' for a cleaner, truer namespace; (2) secure a realistic domain (gethaunt.com / haunt.tools / haunts.app); (3) App Store listing with a descriptor subtitle ('Haunt — Folder Jumper'); (4) formal USPTO trademark search in the software class. Internal name z-for-finder stays for repo/bundle id during dev.
MAS won't allow access to important files so developer ID it is

VALIDATED on Tahoe via spikes/finder-track-probe.swift. Apple Events (NSAppleScript -> Finder) reliably reads the current folder AND follows navigation: a 2s poll captured ~10 folder changes in real time (~2s latency each), zero errors. Permission = one-time Automation consent (not Accessibility/FDA), low friction. Nuances for impl: prefer 'target of front Finder window' over 'insertion location' (latter can diverge, reflecting a selected subfolder); live-nav ingests noise (/Applications, Screenshots, transient/deep paths) that the RANKING layer must down-weight, not the tracker. Production impl = wire the fork's FinderTracker (correct approach, currently dead code) into canonical — tracked in docs/harvest-plan.md.

Live Finder-navigation tracking shipped and verified on main (Session 5). FinderTracker polls Finder front-window via Apple Events into AppState.trackNavigation when Learn-from-navigation is on; pure filter+dedupe unit-tested; 144 tests + swift build green. Real-folder navigation records to frecency.json within ~2-3s and OFF stops polling, both verified live.
gethaunts.app registered by Rhyd (2026-06-06). Domain secured.
Decided: NOT shipping via Mac App Store. Distribution = Developer ID + notarization + Sparkle (the sandbox conflicts with Apple-Events Finder tracking + Sparkle). Closes the MAS option.
Closed
Closed

Done 2026-06-06: GH repo renamed rhydlewis/z-for-finder -> rhydlewis/haunts (private); local origin remote updated + reachable; BuyMeACoffee link rhydlewis->rhyd in PreferencesView (committed/pushed); About GitHub link (github.com/rhydlewis/haunts) now resolves; no other stale user-facing links. Internal target 'zforfinder' + bundle id intentionally unchanged. Local dir path unchanged.

Haunts.app assembled by scripts/build-app.sh from swift build -c release. Verified: bundle id app.gethaunts.Haunts, LSUIElement honored (lsappinfo type=UIElement, no Dock icon), launches from bundle, icon correct (ember-ghost extracted from icns), version 0.1.0(1) from Info.plist, 164 tests + CI green. Caveat: machine was at the lock screen, so menu-bar ghost / hotkey palette / launch-at-login toggle not eyeballed live — same code paths as the dev binary verified S4-S6. Signing=4fd, Sparkle=7hr, release=ge2.

Shipped AccentColor #E8732C in packaging/Assets.xcassets, compiled to Assets.car by actool, + NSAccentColorName=AccentColor in Info.plist. assetutil confirms the named color is exactly sRGB #E8732C in the built bundle. This is the standard mechanism for the Preferences tab-pill accent (no custom tab bar). Caveat: locked screen prevented a live pixel check of the pill — user should glance at Preferences > General to confirm ember.

Signed (Developer ID, hardened runtime, apple-events entitlement) + notarized (Accepted, submission 0e1800e7-2a38-4df2-b0be-322c727d55d5) + stapled; spctl=accepted. scripts/sign-notarize.sh + app/Entitlements.plist. Apple Events/Finder tracking verified intact under signing. 164 tests green.
Shipped: Settings.editorTargets (+auto-detect) + Open With tab (enable/reorder/auto-detect editors + terminal picker) in S3/S4; .editor verb opens the top enabled target by bundle id.

Shipped S4: hotkey recorder in Preferences persists Settings.hotkeyKeyCode/modifiers; HotKey reads Settings and re-registers via .zffRemapHotKey. (Choice of a better DEFAULT chord is tracked separately in 8wa.)

Resolved by implementation: git-root rollup + the subfolderFrecency setting (Rollup.keepSubfolder, keep-after-N-visits) + live FinderTracker ('roll up to the folder you actually open') answer the folder-vs-project question the bead predicted. No further decision needed.

Default summon chord changed ⌃⌘Space→⌥Space (Settings.defaultHotkeyModifiers 4352→2048, keyCode stays 49). Fresh installs flip; stored overrides preserved. Menu hint + Preferences render ⌥Space via existing HotKeyUtils chain. +3 tests, 167 green. Verified live: ⌥Space opens palette, ⌃⌘Space no longer summons Haunts.

Sparkle 2.9.2 linked; SUPublicEDKey in Info.plist (private key in login keychain account=haunts); Check-for-Updates menu opens Sparkle UI; signed app + nested-signed Sparkle.framework pass codesign --strict --deep, notarytool Accepted, spctl accepts; generate-appcast.sh emits EdDSA-signed appcast.xml; LOCAL self-update verified end-to-end (v0.1.0 -> v0.2.0 over localhost HTTP: detect, EdDSA verify, download, install, relaunch, Gatekeeper-clean); tampered+wrong-key rejected; 167 tests green; pushed; CI green. Hosted gethaunts.app test deferred to ge2.

Release pipeline shipped: release.sh + make-dmg.sh + update-site.mjs. Published v0.1.0 AND v0.1.1 to gethaunts.app (DMG hosted on site, app repo tag-only). Hosted Sparkle end-to-end VERIFIED: live 0.1.0 detected 0.1.1 via gethaunts.app/appcast.xml, downloaded, EdDSA-verified, installed in place, relaunched as 0.1.1.
Shipped in v0.1.1; footer now 'Made in Whitstable, UK by Rhyd Lewis' (link to rhydlewis.net), verified live via the auto-update.

Implemented anonymous install/upgrade counting (Analytics.swift in HauntsCore): pure launchEvent + countURL decision (unit-tested), impure fire-and-forget GET to haunts.goatcounter.com/count, fail-silent + non-blocking, wired into AppDelegate launch. Paths /app/install/<v> and /app/upgrade/<old>-to-<new>; no token/identifiers/paths. 16 new tests, 183 total green. Live endpoint verified (HTTP 200). DESIGN CHANGE per user: NOT optional — removed the planned Settings opt-out toggle; the behaviour is disclosed in the gethaunts.app privacy + index copy (already live). Ships with the next release.
bash history parsing added: pure parseBash skips #epoch comment lines, bashURL wired into ShellHistorySource; 12 shell tests + full suite (186) green; committed to main
Implemented + verified live in running app, committed to main
Implemented + verified live in running app, committed to main
Removed 19 internal docs (session prompts, context/handoff, planning, mockups) now the repo is public; kept README/CLAUDE/AGENTS/LICENSE. No code refs to the removed files.

Added JumpDatabases adapter (pure parseZoxide/parseZ/parseAutojump + JumpSource), wired into AppState.rebuild as 'jump' source (sync z/autojump + async zoxide CLI), trust 1.2 in WarmSeed. Verified: seeded z DB via $_Z_DATA → 'jump' appears in HAUNTS_DUMP_INDEX warm seed. 199 tests green.
